title: pituranthos denudatus subsp. battendieri
intro: Pituranthos denudatus subsp. battendieri, also known as Italian angelica, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Italian angelica include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiviral agent. Italian angelica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and homeopathic treatments.
